title: gardenia mannii
intro: Gardenia mannii, also known as the white gardenia or Makalani, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Native to Madagascar, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Gardenia mannii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Gardenia mannii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
